# XTerm Online

> XTerm Online is a professional web-based terminal using xterm.js with WebSocket support. Access remote servers securely from your browser with a modern, responsive interface.

## Main Features

- [Web Terminal](/): Professional web-based terminal emulator powered by xterm.js
- [WebSocket Support](/): Real-time bidirectional communication with remote servers
- [Cross-Platform](/): Works seamlessly on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

## Key Facts

- Free to use, no sign-up required
- Powered by xterm.js — the same terminal engine used in VS Code
- Secure WebSocket connections with modern encryption
- Responsive design optimized for all screen sizes
- Open source and self-hostable

## Technical Stack

- Next.js 16 with App Router
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- xterm.js 5.5

## Use Cases

- Remote server management via WebSocket
- Browser-based SSH terminal
- Cloud development environments
- Online coding playgrounds
- Terminal-based application demos
